flow 1: user -> arriva raccolta -> aggiungi documento -> aggiungi campo -> allattamento
the diagram depicts a navigation flow within a web application or system.
the flow starts from the "user" and progresses through several components: "arriva raccolta", "aggiungi documento", "aggiungi campo", and finally "allattamento".
the "famiglia" and "shqjuh095" components are also present, suggesting a hierarchical structure or relationship within the system.
the "aggiungi campo" component appears to be responsible for collecting and displaying data, as it has attributes like "email", "familycode", "nome", and "pictureurl".

the diagram models the flow of actions related to a footer menu on a webpage.
the flow starts with accessing the footer menu and can lead to either the monitoring section or a return to the home page.
a "note" action is present, which is reached after the monitoring section and before a potential return to the home page.
the diagram shows a cyclical flow, where the process can repeat from the footer menu access.
